name: conditional-row-beats-column
description: 3x3 table with style that has firstRow conditional (red shading FF0000) and firstCol conditional (blue shading 0000FF). tblLook enables firstRow and firstColumn. Per MS-OI29500 §2.1.246, firstRow is applied AFTER firstCol, so at corner cell (0,0) firstRow shading (red) should win.
